summary: Tightened the qd report checker so roadmap edge records must reference known nodes, avoid self-edges and duplicate triples, and use the accepted edge type vocabulary.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects edges[] entries whose from_node or to_node does not match a node in roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_edge_node_ids builds a node id index from roadmap/qd-export.json and reports non-blank missing or unknown edge endpoints; evidence/m4-qd-edge-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-edge-endpoint.log records the expected rejection.
validate_roadmap_edge_self_edges rejects an edge whose normalized from_node equals to_node; evidence/m4-qd-edge-schema-contract/negative-smoke-self-edge.log records the expected rejection.

validate_roadmap_edge_duplicates groups by from_node, to_node, and type and reports later duplicates; evidence/m4-qd-edge-schema-contract/negative-smoke-duplicate-edge.log records the expected rejection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects unknown edges[].type values outside requires.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_record_values validates edges[].type against requires; evidence/m4-qd-edge-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-edge-type.log records type=blocks failing as expected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Current reports/export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-edge-schema-contract/qd-reports-check.log records just qd-reports-check passing with the stricter edge contract.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Evidence under evidence/m4-qd-edge-schema-contract includes qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, four negative smoke logs, and git-diff-check.log.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains the requested positive validation logs, temporary-copy negative smoke logs, and git diff --check log.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Add reports/qd/m4-qd-edge-schema-contract/completion.json and audit.json with matching nodeId and merge commit evidence.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: reports/qd/m4-qd-edge-schema-contract/completion.json and reports/qd/m4-qd-edge-schema-contract/audit.json both use nodeId=m4-qd-edge-schema-contract; completion commits[] records merge commit a041996ab769447f463d830e3f5ce604aa5e3cce.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime, macOS, hardware, capture, transport, decode, render, or latency behavior is claimed.
